steps.title: Fit p as a function of c
steps.content: Treat the number of cars $c$ as $x$ and the capacity $p$ as $y$. The table gives $(0,9)$ and $(1,64)$, so run a linear regression.

steps.title: Convert to the answer form
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=55$ and $b=9$, so $p=55c+9$. Move $p$ to the left: $$55c-p=-9$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $55c-p=-9$, so A is correct.
